rationale: Peer r2c0 is sharing responsibly within their safe margin (0.46 SoC fraction well above their 0.35 threshold), the 0.35 kWh offer is modest and aligns with geographic load-balancing to below-mean peers, and accepting supports collective resilience without compromising our 0.55 conservative threshold.
